__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=The Triumph of Bacchus,Caspian Sea Monster,Laocoön,Wounded Lioness,Meidum Geese,The Persistent Memory
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=minion
|description=All minion skins ATK +120%
}}
[[Category:Minion]]
[[Category:Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Minion Skin Boost]]
